reviews.author: nellaidavid
reviews.review_body: It is a very good school because we have everything over there and good condition good education 👏 and extra curricular activities.

reviews.author: Muralikrishna J
reviews.review_body: It is an amazing school. I am Muralikrishna, studying here since Pre-KG. Now I am grade 7 and I will be educated here till 12th. You will find good food, high quality education and numerous trips. I just returned today from a school fun trip to Hyderabad (for 4 days). You can always enjoy learning here. 😍

reviews.author: geetha babu
reviews.review_body: Even im a student of DR. Dasarathan international school

reviews.author: Gomathi T
reviews.review_body: I am very happy with the school. The entire staff is supportive and cooperative. My daughter is doing very well.

reviews.author: Nishanth
reviews.review_body:
Dr. DIS provides a "feel like home" experience for children, with wonderful teachers who nurture students to their best potential. The campus boasts excellent infrastructure and amenities, fostering growth in every possible way.

The management excels in training the faculty, ensuring top-notch teaching materials. The school not only educates students academically but also shapes them into good citizens, offering value-based education beyond textbooks.

The teachers are always willing to go the extra mile to help my child learn and succeed. I am truly grateful for their dedication and hard work.

The most impressive aspect is the holistic learning approach, which makes my child joyful about attending school. I strongly recommend Dr. DIS to new parents seeking balanced and comprehensive education for their children.

reviews.author: Nave Pras
reviews.review_body: Hearty appreciations to the dynamic management and all the lovely teachers for their meticulous efforts in fostering the overall growth and development of my child. Your play based learning approach is  amazing. Thank you for instilling this love for learning. We are so glad to see the progress in her civility and healthy food habits as well. This is a top-notch institution for the children.

reviews.author: ravi ruby
reviews.review_body:
*I am eternally grateful for your support in helping my son become the best version of himself.
*I am impressed with your curriculum and teaching methods which is different from other schools. Well planned worksheets for practice makes my child think beyond prescribed Textbooks. I like to take this privilege to congratulate the management of the School for its endless efforts.
*" The Staff and Principal are very polite and cooperative and the best part is that the school is using different learning styles like smart boards which makes learning fun for all students".
*I am glad about the mentors who mould my son for the better future.

reviews.author: Harish sekaran
reviews.review_body: Extremely happy with the kind of activities organised in  Dr.Dasarathan International school for children’s physical, social and intellectual development.
